---
title: "Project 2 Tables"
author: "Lu Bai"
date: "2026-03-29"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(flextable)
```

# Table 1
```{r}
# Create the data frame
model_df <- data.frame(
  Aim = c("1a", "1b", "2"),
  Primary_Outcome = c(
    "Change in continuous memory variables: 
    - CVLT (20' Delay Total Correct, Recognition D-Prime),
    - Benson Figure (15' Delay Total Correct), 
    - MST Proportion Correct, 
    - Story Recall (1-Week Delay Total Correct)
    & AD-signature cortical thickness over 1 year",
    "Change in continuous memory variables: 
    - CVLT (20' Delay Total Correct, Recognition D-Prime),
    - Benson Figure (15' Delay Total Correct), 
    - MST Proportion Correct, 
    - Story Recall (1-Week Delay Total Correct)
    & AD-signature cortical thickness over 1 year",
    "Change in continuous memory variables: 
    - CVLT (20' Delay Total Correct, Recognition D-Prime),
    - Benson Figure (15' Delay Total Correct), 
    - MST Proportion Correct, 
    - Story Recall (1-Week Delay Total Correct)
    & AD-signature cortical thickness over 1 year"
  ),
  Primary_Exposure = c(
    "Baseline levels of 1 Inflammatory Marker (e.g., IL-6, TNF-a, MCP-1, or Eotaxin-1)",
    "1-year change in 1 Inflammatory Marker (follow-up minus baseline)",
    "Interaction Term: Baseline Amyloid PET x Baseline Inflammatory Marker"
  ),
  Demographics = c(
    "Age, Sex, Education, Clinical Group (HC/aMCI)",
    "Age, Sex, Education, Clinical Group (HC/aMCI)",
    "Age, Sex, Education, Clinical Group (HC/aMCI)"
  ),
  Potential_Confounders = c(
    "APOE genotype, CV risk, BMI, history of hypercholesterolemia, NSAID use",
    "APOE genotype, CV risk, BMI, history of hypercholesterolemia, NSAID use",
    "Amyloid PET (main effect), APOE, CV risk, BMI, history of hypercholesterolemia, NSAID use"
  ),
  Total_Predictors = c("1+4+0~5 = 5~10",
                       "1+4+0~5 = 5~10", 
                       "1+0~2(main effect)+4+0~5 = 5~12")
)
```

```{r}
# Generate the flextable
ft_tb1 <- flextable(model_df) %>%
  autofit() %>% 
  # Merge identical vertical cells
  merge_v(j = c("Primary_Outcome", "Demographics", "Potential_Confounders", "Total_Predictors")) %>%
  # Label headers clearly
  set_header_labels(
    Aim = "Aim",
    Primary_Outcome = "Primary Outcomes (n = 6)",
    Primary_Exposure = "Primary Exposure (n = 4)",
    Demographics = "Demographics (n = 4)",
    Potential_Confounders = "Potential Confounders*",
    Total_Predictors = "Total Covariates (k)"
  ) %>%
  # Formatting
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  valign(j = c(2, 4, 5), valign = "center") %>% # Center the merged text vertically
  align(j = c(1, 6), align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  bg(j = "Total_Predictors", bg = "#F9F9F9") %>%
  # Set column widths for readability
  width(j = 1, width = 0.5) %>%
  width(j = 2:3, width = 1.5) %>%
  width(j = 4:6, width = 1) %>%
  # Add footnote about variable reduction
  add_footer_lines("*Only one of the highly correlated potential confounders (|r| > 0.7) will be included to prevent over-fitting.") %>%
  italic(part = "footer") %>%
  set_caption("Table 1.Summary of outcomes, predictors, and covariates for analysis relationship between peripheral inflammation, amyloid pathology, and cognitive/structural decline")
```

\pagebreak
```{r}
ft_tb1
```

\pagebreak

# Table 2
```{r}
final_df2 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/final_df.csv")
bonf_alpha <- round(0.05/(2*1*3),4)

ft <- flextable(final_df2) %>%
  # Merge vertical cells for aim and outcome if they are the same
  merge_v(j = c("Aim", "Outcome")) %>%
  # Merge outcome and markers columns only for the summary rows
  merge_h_range(i = ~ Outcome == "Summary range", j1 = "Outcome", j2 = "Markers") %>%
  # Layout
  set_header_labels(Outcome = "Outcome Measures", Markers = "Markers Group") %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  align(j = 4:6, align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  bold(i = ~ Outcome == "Summary range", bold = TRUE) %>%
  bg(i = ~ Outcome == "Summary range", bg = "#F2F2F2") %>%
  set_caption(paste0("Table 2. Required Sample Size (N) by Power and Alpha = ", bonf_alpha))
ft
```

\pagebreak

## Code Appendix

```{r ref.label=knitr::all_labels(appendix == TRUE), echo=TRUE, eval=FALSE, include=TRUE}
```
